TalkTitleUsed: AgentOps in the Real World: Lessons from a Multi-Agent Pipeline
AbstractUsed: A walk through a real multi-agent system on Microsoft Agent Framework and Azure AI Foundry — the observability, idempotency, and identity patterns that turned a clever demo into something I would let page me at 2 AM.
Notes: Confirmed for the AgentOps track; 60 min slot.

TalkTitleUsed: Hybrid Agents Unleashed: Copilot Studio Meets Pro-Code
AbstractUsed: Low-code Copilot Studio agents and pro-code Microsoft Agent Framework agents are layers, not rivals. This session walks through three real workloads and shows where each platform earns its keep — and how they share a single Foundry model fabric without stepping on each other.
Notes: Backup option: AgentOps in the Real World if track fit is wrong.

TalkTitleUsed: Azure AI Foundry for Enterprise: Patterns That Hold Up Under Audit
AbstractUsed: Most Foundry demos run with an open subscription and a personal key. Enterprise reality has private endpoints, conditional access, customer-managed keys, and a finance team that wants per-token attribution. Five patterns that bridge the gap.
